title: Department Manager Vacancy at Domino's India International Enterprises - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Department Manager Vacancy at Domino's India International Enterprises - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Department Manager with drive and ambition, Domino's India International Enterprises in Kolkata is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Domino's India International Enterprises:
Domino's India International Enterprises is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in KPI Management
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in Team Leadership
• Proficiency in CRM
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention
• Proficiency in Category Management

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Life and accident insurance
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Kolkata, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Domino's India International Enterprises!
